titles.title: There Is Power in the Name of Jesus

authors.author: Noel Richards
Noel Richards
Es ist Kraft in dem Namen Jesus

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is power in the name of Jesus There is power in the name of Jesus There is power in the name of Jesus To break every chain Break every chain Break every chain

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's an army rising up There's an army rising up There's an army rising up To break every chain Break every chain Break every chain

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is power in the Blood of Jesus There is power in the Blood of Jesus There is power in the Blood of Jesus To break every chain Break every chain Break every chain

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's a Bride who's rising up There's a Bride who's rising up There's a Bride who's rising up To break every chain Break every chain Break every chain

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I hear those chains falling I hear those chains falling I hear those chains falling I hear those chains falling
